title: Compliance-as-Code
description: Integrate automated policy checks (e.g., OPA) into CI/CD pipelines. Detect PII leakage in logs, unencrypted storage, or overly permissive IAM roles before deployment.
objectives: Integrate automated policy checks (e.g., OPA) into CI/CD pipelines.
Detect PII leakage in logs, unencrypted storage, or overly permissive IAM roles before deployment.
